title: Ratcheting Screwdriver, HOUSERAN Ratcheting Screwdriver Set, 10-in-1 Multi Bit Screwdriver, 90-Degree Adjust Precision Screw Driver, Electrical and Electronics Ratchet Driver, Slotted/Philips/Torx
features: 10 in 1 Multi-Bit Screwdriver - This ratchet screwdriver set includes slot, Philips, Torx, Tri-point and a wrench, making it suitable for a wide range of applications.
RATCHET SCREWDRIVER - The ratchet function of this screwdriver set allows for faster and more efficient screwing.
Adjustable 90-degree screwdriver: changing the angle to 90° greatly aids the leverage effect for torque.
High quality: the HOUSERAN screwdriver bit is made of chrome vanadium steel, ensuring its longevity and reliability.
Comfortable Grip The screwdrivers are designed with an ergonomic handle that provides a comfortable grip.
description: Product Description Previous page Extremely practical A wide range of screwdriver bits to match your various work scenarios. Comfortable grip The handle is made of PVC and is ergonomic. Comfortable to hold, non-slip and oil-resistant. Adjustable direction The directional ratchet mechanism allows you to do assembly and disassembly with one hand. conveniently portable The screwdriver head is hidden in the handle to save storage space and make it easy to carry around. conveniently portable The screwdriver head is hidden in the handle to save storage space and make it easy to carry around.
